name: Kōnane
author: AGP port (Hawaiian checkers)
description: Kōnane (Hawaiian checkers): a combinatorial-game-theory classic. The board starts completely filled with alternating black and white stones. Black opens by removing one of its stones from a corner or center; White removes an adjacent stone. Then players capture by jumping orthogonally over an adjacent enemy stone into the empty space beyond, chaining straight-line jumps. The first player who cannot move loses.
